footer.tagline: Korea's housing & living-info platform for the Russian-speaking community

home.slogan1: The best proposal for living in Korea
home.slogan2: The most listings, paired with legal advice and interpretation
home.slogan3: The best choice for native Russian speakers
home.feature1Body: Unlike Zigbang or Dabang, we provide listings, contracts, and daily-life guides all in Russian.
home.feature2Body: A certified interpreter can join your viewing so you can sign contracts safely without a language barrier.
home.feature3Body: Get a lawyer's rights-analysis report before you sign, so you can catch risks in advance.
home.how1: Search listings and check their location on the map
home.how2: Contact the agent or book a viewing for a listing you like
home.how3: If needed, request an interpreter escort and a lawyer's rights analysis
home.trust1: Built by a Supreme Court-certified court interpreter
home.trust2: Backed by the trust of the Pyeongtaek Koryo-saram Support Association community
home.trust3: Run with the team behind the 51K-subscriber YouTube channel 'Yang-ssaem's Korean Class'

terms.title: Terms of Use

sections.heading: Article 1 (Purpose)
sections.body: These Terms set out the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between KopДом ("the Company") and its members in connection with the use of the housing and living-information platform for the Russian-speaking community (the "Service").

sections.heading: Article 2 (Description of the Service)
sections.body: The Company provides: 1) browsing and searching of listings registered by real estate agents, 2) intermediation for contacting agents and booking viewings, 3) matching with admin-verified interpreters for accompanied visits, 4) referral to partner lawyers for rights-analysis reports and legal advice, and 5) informational content such as columns on real-estate contracts. Paid features requiring payment will be rolled out gradually with separate notice.

sections.heading: Article 3 (Membership)
sections.body: Members are either 'Home Seekers' or 'Real Estate Agents.' Agent members must submit their license/registration number and supporting documents, and may only list properties after the Company verifies and approves them. Interpreters and column-writing lawyers are not open to self-registration; the Company verifies their credentials and adds them directly.

sections.heading: Article 4 (Accuracy of Information; Limits of Liability)
sections.body: Listing information is the responsibility of the agent who registered it; interpretation services are the responsibility of the interpreter; and legal advice or rights-analysis reports are the responsibility of the lawyer (and their firm) who prepared them. The Company operates the platform connecting users with agents, interpreters, and lawyers, and is not a party to the actual lease, interpretation, or legal-advice contracts.

sections.heading: Article 5 (Prohibited Conduct)
sections.body: Members must not register false listings, misuse another person's license, or use information obtained through the Service for unauthorized purposes. The Company may restrict access for members who violate this.

sections.heading: Article 6 (Changes to or Suspension of the Service)
sections.body: The Company may change or suspend all or part of the Service for operational or technical reasons, with advance notice.

sections.heading: Article 7 (Disclaimer)
sections.body: The Company is not liable, to the extent permitted by applicable law, for damages arising from force majeure, disputes between members, or errors in information provided by members.

sections.heading: Article 8 (Governing Law and Jurisdiction)
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, and disputes arising from use of the Service may be brought before a court of competent jurisdiction.

terms.draftNotice: These Terms are a prototype-stage draft and will be finalized after review by KNK Law Firm before official launch.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 1. Personal Information Collected
sections.body: General members: name, email, phone number, nationality (optional). Agent members: name, email, phone number, agency name, real estate license/registration number, license certificate. Additional information such as contact requests, viewing bookings, and rights-analysis requests may be collected during use of the Service.

sections.heading: 2. Purpose of Collection and Use
sections.body: Identifying members and confirming intent to join, verifying agent licenses, matching listings with users, providing interpreter and lawyer referral services, responding to inquiries, and handling notices and complaints.

sections.heading: 3. Retention Period
sections.body: Personal information is destroyed without delay upon account withdrawal, except where a longer retention period is required by applicable law.

sections.heading: 4. Provision to Third Parties
sections.body: The Company shares only the minimum information necessary (name, contact information, request details) with the agent, interpreter, or partner lawyer/firm that the user has selected, and only for requests the user has personally submitted. Information is not otherwise shared with third parties without the user's consent.

sections.heading: 5. Outsourcing of Processing
sections.body: There is currently no outsourcing of personal data processing. If outsourcing to a payment provider or cloud hosting service becomes necessary in the future, this will be disclosed in advance through this policy.

sections.heading: 6. User Rights
sections.body: Users may access, correct, or delete their personal information, or request suspension of processing at any time, and may withdraw consent by closing their account.

sections.heading: 7. Security Measures
sections.body: The Company minimizes access to personal information and applies reasonable technical and administrative safeguards. (This prototype is a demo that stores data temporarily in the browser only; a proper security architecture will be built before real launch.)

sections.heading: 8. Data Protection Officer
sections.body: Name: Yang Sung-gyu / Email: contact@kordom.demo (temporary prototype contact)

privacy.draftNotice: This Policy is a prototype-stage draft and will be finalized after review by KNK Law Firm before official launch.
